artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for the registered artifact (UUID or structured name)

type.description: The category of the registry artifact

version.description: Semantic version of the artifact release

description.description: Contextual description of changes, parameters, or compatibility requirements

filename.description: File basename of the target artifact package (e.g. model.gguf, core.tar.gz)

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 integrity hash value of the artifact file binary

download_url.description: Target download path or repository storage reference

signature.description: Cryptographic signature verifying that this metadata was signed by a trusted developer certificate
